overall.description: A nighttime walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city, following a character through elevated walkways, street intersections, and stairways. The footage shows high-quality game engine graphics with vibrant neon signage reflecting off wet pavement, characteristic of a futuristic urban environment like Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated covered walkway, passing blue vending machines and arcade cabinets on the left side

entered.detail: overhead concrete roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway
illuminated blue arcade vending machine with colorful displays
tall commercial building with large pink TENGU signage visible in the distance
light blue safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated covered walkway with concrete pavement and blue safety railings. Neon signs illuminate the path ahead, with a large TENGU building visible in the distance. The camera moves forward past blue vending machines and arcade cabinets on the left, with the covered roof structure overhead providing shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with large commercial building

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street level area with the TENGU building prominently visible
crosses street at intersection following a pedestrian, navigating around orange railings

agents.ego_description: descending from the elevated walkway and crossing the street, closely following a pedestrian wearing a pink top

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in a pink top walking ahead of ego toward and across the intersection

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the street intersection
bright orange safety barriers at the edge of the walkway descent
tall vertical digital screen displaying advertisements with blue and white imagery

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera exits the covered walkway into a wide urban intersection. The TENGU building dominates the left side with its bright pink signage. The camera follows a pedestrian in a pink top across the street, passing orange safety railings and navigating the crosswalk. An overpass bridge spans the intersection ahead, while large digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon signage and wet pavement

events.description: crosses second intersection with yellow striped crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past illuminated storefronts, navigating through neon-lit commercial streets

entered.detail: large vertical digital advertisement screen showing a character with blue hair
black metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street
broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
tall cylindrical residential tower with curved balconies and green accent lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along street level, the camera passes by a large vertical billboard on the right and follows the wet concrete sidewalk. The street is lined with black metal railings on the left and features a distinctive curved residential tower on the right. The segment includes crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk at an intersection, with various neon storefronts and holographic advertisements illuminating the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway ascending to elevated pedestrian plaza

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs to upper pedestrian level
reaches top of stairs entering elevated plaza with red paper lanterns and vending machines

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs to an elevated plaza, passing under hanging paper lanterns

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings ascending between building walls
traditional white and red paper lanterns hanging above the stairway
open pedestrian area at the top of the stairs with vending machines and city views
metal barrel with fire burning inside, emitting orange light

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a stairway ascent, leaving the street level behind. The camera climbs wide concrete stairs flanked by building walls and metal railings, passing under traditional paper lanterns. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens into an elevated plaza featuring red vending machines, a burning barrel emitting orange light, and views of the neon-lit city skyline in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered elevated walkway down into a vibrant urban intersection and finally up to a high-altitude plaza. It begins under a covered roof, gliding past blue vending machines and arcade cabinets toward the distant glow of a TENGU building. As the camera exits the walkway, the scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by bright pink signage and digital billboards, following a pedestrian across wet pavement and under a spanning overpass. The movement then shifts to street level, passing a curved residential tower and holographic advertisements before crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. Finally, the camera ascends a wide concrete stairway lined with traditional paper lanterns, emerging onto an elevated plaza featuring a burning barrel and a panoramic view of the neon-lit city skyline.
